title: Cognizant Technology Solutions: Wall Street's Latest Bargain Bin Giveaway
text: Cognizant is a low-leveraged, high-functioning global IT services player with a contemporary business model, solid fundamentals, and a discounted stock price supported by below-average downside risks. By helping global clients become data-enabled and data-driven in the digital era, Cognizant has produced a timely, profitable, and enduring enterprise.

title: Cognizant (CTSH) Set to Acquire Consultancy Firm Utegration
text: Cognizant (CTSH) to acquire Utegration LLC to boost digital transformation in the energy and utilities sectors.
